Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Empty Palm]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — The Empty Palm is a technique used by Lindon that involves focusing madra at the base of the palm to create an invisible thorn-like effect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — The Empty Palm lands with an invisible thorn that drives into the opponent like a hammer driving a nail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Empty Palm is a technique that disrupts the enemy's spirit with an injection into the core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon finds the Empty Palm to be perfectly suited for him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Empty Palm is a technique used by Lindon in his fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon landed an Empty Palm on Markuth's core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Empty Palm is a technique that allows a sacred artist to affect an enemy on the same level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Empty Palm is a technique that only reaches a few inches.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The full use of the Empty Palm technique exhausts the user quickly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Empty Palm technique blasts chunks out of Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Empty Palm is a technique used by the red man construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The primitive Striker technique Lindon uses is more like an Empty Palm than a hurled fireball.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Empty Palm is a strike technique.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Empty Palm is a technique Lindon has recorded notes on.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Empty Palm is the only real technique in Lindon's Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Empty Palm is a technique Lindon wants to improve.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — The Empty Palm can be used to disable an enemy's core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — The Empty Palm can be used to light up concentric rings on a script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon gathered madra into his Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon worked on the Empty Palm technique using Akura Fury's advice.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Empty Palm is a technique used to slam into a target's core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Empty Palm is a technique that would require reinvention to adopt Hollow King madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon used Empty Palm to blast a chunk out of the storm gecko Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon uses the Empty Palm technique on Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon used his Empty Palm to strike an enemy Underlord’s core.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Empty Palm is a technique Lindon used to take down Teris' father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Empty Palm technique wipes out madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Empty Palm is a technique that drives madra from a target's core.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue uses the Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon used an Empty Palm against the silver bats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — The Empty Palm washes a human's madra channels clean and robs them of control over their spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — On a spirit, the Empty Palm blasts away the material of their body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon used a soulfire-infused Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon uses the Empty Palm technique to meet acidic liquid.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Empty Palm is a technique that can be Forged into a giant shape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon used an oversized, blue-white palm strike of pure madra called Empty Palm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon met Northstrider's punch with an Empty Palm.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Empty Palm disarmed an Archlord’s puppet construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Little Blue used an Empty Palm the size of her new human body to wipe out Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon used an Empty Palm that projected a blue-white handprint.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Empty Palms is a technique that covers the sky and warps regional aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Empty Palm is Lindon's first and oldest technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — An Empty Palm can dissolve an arrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon's Empty Palm is a technique he has perfected the most.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Empty Palm is a technique used by Bloody Thorn.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
